Name: Valkyrate pirates
Description: Valkyrate pirates originate from the rough bandit kingdom of the Greater Valkyrate, and are notable for emphasizing the dominance of women over men.
ReputationStatements: If you run when the shooting starts, I’ll personally hunt you down.
You fight well enough. Shame about the smell of cowardice that follows mercenary companies.
A proper raid should leave burning wrecks and terrified survivors. Preferably both.
Hungry for money, I see? There is no shortage of prey on the frontier.
Be bold, fast, and ruthless. These are the instincts of the Valkyr.
Your blades will be tested. So will your discipline. Burn them in their cockpits for us.
You have the respect of the Valkyr. That is not given lightly.
MissionSuccessStatements: A glorious victory. Songs will be sung about the wreckage you left behind.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Predators survive by committing. Prey survives by running. You made your choice.
